Complications.Title: Complication Mechanic
Complications.Intro: Roll once for the scene. If a complication appears, the macro also rolls the source of danger, the effect, and the optional character of the complication.

early.Label: Early Apocalypse
early.Hint: Lower base complication threshold, but trouble can still surface in unsafe places.

full.Label: Full Apocalypse
full.Hint: Default balance for a world where danger is constant and resources are already strained.

late.Label: Late Apocalypse
late.Hint: The harshest stage. Complications hit more often and gain character more easily.

shelter.Label: Shelter / safer place
shelter.Hint: Relative safety lowers the complication threshold by 10.

standard.Label: Standard terrain
standard.Hint: Normal risk. No modifier to the complication threshold.

danger.Label: Very dangerous place
danger.Hint: The scene is hostile enough to raise the complication threshold by 10.

Complications.Note: The full roll follows your procedure in order: test whether a complication happens, then roll Source of Danger and Effect, and finally test for Character.

Chat.SuccessText: Something in this scene turns against the group. The world shifts just enough to make the next step harder, meaner, or more costly.
Chat.FailureText: For now, the world holds its breath. No new complication rises out of this scene, but that kind of peace never lasts for long.
